summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with hands-on experience shipping Python and JavaScript systems into production. Deployed LLM-powered applications end-to-end — including a real-time AI interview platform and a production RAG developer tool — using Docker, Kubernetes, FastAPI, and CI/CD pipelines on GitHub Actions. Comfortable owning full backend lifecycles from database design to API development to infrastructure, and thrive in fast-moving environments where output matters more than tenure.

skills.languages: Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, SQL, Go, Java (familiar), C++ (familiar)
skills.ml: Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LangChain, Prompt Engineering, HuggingFace Transformers, PyTorch, NLP, Computer Vision, Semantic Search, Vector Embeddings
skills.infra: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), FastAPI, Express.js, Node.js, RESTful APIs, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Pinecone, AWS, GCP, Railway, Vercel, Git
